parameters.query:
SELECT publish_at 
FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts 
WHERE channel = 'individual'
  AND is_scheduled = TRUE 
  AND publish_at > NOW() 
ORDER BY publish_at ASC;

SELECT id, created_at 
FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts 
WHERE channel = 'individual'
  AND status = 'approved' 
  AND is_approved = TRUE 
  AND is_scheduled = FALSE 
ORDER BY id ASC;

UPDATE t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
SET is_scheduled = TRUE,
    publish_at = '{{ $json.publish_at }}',
    timezone = '{{ $json.timezone }}',
    status = 'scheduled',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.id }};
